domain: Karelian itkuvirsi (Veps/Karelian women's lament; verse cycles with emotional decrescendo from intense initial to diminishing intensity to final whisper; ritualised lifecycle marker)
specific_mechanism: Paraphrase-cycle confidence-decay factor alpha^k applied to logits; lowest-confidence response surfaced as final answer; inverse self-consistency.
llm_application: VEPS-DECRESCENDO: a feedback-attenuation protocol where the same query is paraphrased K times automatically; at cycle k the response logits are scaled by alpha^k (alpha<1) before softmax, producing progressively lower-confidence outputs. Final answer is the LOWEST-confidence response across cycles — surfacing what the model is genuinely unsure about. Differs from Self-Consistency (which picks highest-frequency mode), repeated-paraphrase consistency benchmarks (JMIR 2025 — measures variance, doesn't decay logits), Verbalised Confidence Elicitation (single-pass) by combining (a) paraphrase-cycle logit decay alpha^k, (b) lowest-confidence selection, (c) verse-cycle inverse self-consistency.
novelty_claim: UQ Survey + Verbalised Confidence + Paraphrase Consistency benchmarks already exist. VEPS-DECRESCENDO recombines decay + lowest-confidence selection. Small extension.
